# seerr_notification_agent (Data Source)

Read Seerr notification agent settings via /api/v1/settings/notifications/{agent}.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent` (String) Notification agent name (e.g. `email`, `discord`, `slack`).

### Read-Only

- `discord` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--discord))
- `email` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email))
- `embed_poster` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `gotify` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--gotify))
- `lunasea` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--lunasea))
- `ntfy` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ntfy))
- `pushbullet` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pushbullet))
- `pushover` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pushover))
- `slack` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--slack))
- `telegram` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--telegram))
- `types` (Number)
- `webhook` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--webhook))
- `webpush` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--webpush))
